revision.comment: add "orig=yes" to display the original automatically
revision.text: {{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}}

{{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

{{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}} revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|[[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]]}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index other|}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifexpr: {{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}|0|1}} or {{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}|0|1}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{#if:{{{index|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{para|index}} (parameter 1)}} |{{#if:{{{value|{{{2|}}}}}}||{{para|value}} (parameter 2)}} |{{#if:{{{start_year|{{{3|}}}}}}||{{para|start_year}} (parameter 3)}} }} must be specified.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{#ifexist:Template:Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|1|0}} and {{Isnumeric|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}|boolean=true}} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{para|index|'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 1) not a recognized index.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( {{Isnumeric|{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{Isnumeric|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|boolean=true}} and {{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} and {{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Isnumeric|{{{r}}}|boolean=true}} | 1 }} ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]], check parameters for non-numeric data: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|value|'''{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 2)}} |{{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3)}} |{{#if: {{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}|R}}||{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)}} }} |{{#if: {{{r|}}} | {{Ifnumber|{{formatnum:{{{r}}}|R}}||{{para|r|'''{{{r}}}'''}}}} }} }}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifexpr: not( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} >= {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} ) and( ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} <= {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) or ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} = {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) ) and ( {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} <= {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} ) ) |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: {{Separated entries|separator=, |conjunction= and |{{ #ifexpr: {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} < {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}} |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is lower than the earliest available year ('''{{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}/startyear}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}} |{{ #ifexpr: ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} > {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} ) and ( {{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}} != {{{end_year|{{{4|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}}}} ) |{{para|start_year|'''{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 3) is greater than {{#if:{{{end_year|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4)|the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}} |{{ #ifexpr: {{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}} > {{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}} |{{para|end_year|'''{{{end_year|{{{4}}}}}}'''}} (parameter 4) is greater than the latest available year ('''{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}''') in index "'''{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}'''"}}}}.{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{main other|}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|{{{cursign|$}}}{{{2}}} (}}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq|equivalent to {{{cursign|$}}}}}{{formatnum: {{ #iferror: {{#invoke:Math|round|1={{ #expr: {{formatnum:{{{value|{{{2}}}}}}|R}} {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}} | * 1 | {{Inflation/{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} }} round {{{r|0}}} }}|2={{{r|0}}}}} |Error when using {{tl|Inflation}}: [[NaN]]/calculation error, please notify [[Template talk:Inflation]].{{main other|}}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|raw|R|}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{fmt|raw}}}|eq| in {{#ifeq:{{{start_year|{{{3}}}}}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{CURRENTYEAR}}|{{{end_year|{{{4|{{Inflation/year|{{{index|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{orig|}}}|yes|)}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Pages with errors in inflation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
